# AIKnots IT

> AIKnots IT is a software development and AI solutions company delivering web, mobile, cloud, automation, and digital transformation services.

Website: https://aiknotsit.com
Company: AIKnots IT Solutions Pvt Ltd
Contact: https://aiknotsit.com/contact

## About

AIKnots IT helps startups, SMBs, and enterprises build scalable digital products using modern technologies. We specialize in AI-powered applications, custom software development, web applications, mobile apps, cloud infrastructure, automation, and business solutions.

## Core Services

- AI Development
- Generative AI Solutions
- AI Chatbot Development
- AI Automation
- Machine Learning
- Web Development
- React Development
- Node.js Development
- Mobile App Development
- Custom Software Development
- CRM Development
- HRMS Development
- ERP Solutions
- API Development
- Cloud Solutions
- DevOps
- UI/UX Design
- SEO Services
- Digital Marketing
- Branding
- Social Media Marketing

- JavaScript

- OpenAI
- Ollama
- ChromaDB
